title: senna urmenetae
intro: Senna urmenetae, also known as Chilean senna, is a plant species in the legume family that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant contains anthraquinone glycosides, which have been found to have laxative properties, making it useful for treating constipation and related digestive issues. Senna urmenetae has been used to promote bowel movements, relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, and support the overall health of the digestive system. Herbal preparations of Senna urmenetae include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional to support digestive health and well-being.
